title: Mia receives keys to luxury car
bodyText:
ENTERTAINMENT NEWS - Newly crowned Miss South Africa, Mia le Roux, has received the keys to the Mercedes-Benz CLE Coupé that she will drive during her year-long reign.

Mia, who comes from Oudtshoorn, is looking forward to many happy hours in her brand new Benz.


> "I am so excited and I am going to have all the fun in the world with this magnificent car.


"I am so thankful that it is such a safe vehicle with so many in-built safety features and I know I will have so much fun driving it this year.

"It is truly special to me because my oupa was a Mercedes man and I am now driving a Mercedes so it is really a beautiful full circle moment.”

Keep an eye out for Mia le Roux driving her Mercedes-Benz CLE Coupé in the Garden Route! She comes from Oudtshoorn, so hopefully she will take a drive there to visit her parents, Schalk and Liesel, very soon.

- Oudtshoorn's Miss SA embodies 'if you can dream it, you can achieve it'
- Mia le Roux wins Miss South Africa

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
